extracted_concepts.name: fraction
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A number representing part of a whole, a/b

extracted_concepts.name: numerator
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Top number of a fraction, indicating parts taken

extracted_concepts.name: denominator
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Bottom number of a fraction, indicating total parts

extracted_concepts.name: equivalent fractions
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Fractions that represent the same value: 1/2 = 2/4

extracted_concepts.name: factor
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: A number that divides another evenly

extracted_concepts.name: multiple
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Product of a number and an integer

extracted_concepts.name: perimeter
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Total distance around a two-dimensional shape

extracted_concepts.name: angle
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Figure formed by two rays sharing an endpoint

extracted_concepts.name: parallel
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Lines in a plane that never intersect

extracted_concepts.name: perpendicular
extracted_concepts.definition_snippet: Lines that intersect at a right angle (90°)

extracted_relations.evidence: A fraction a/b represents a divided by b
Equivalent fractions are a property of fractions
Perimeter is the sum of all sides
A fraction a/b represents a divided by b
Numerator is the top part of a fraction
Denominator is the bottom part of a fraction
Equivalent fractions represent the same value
Factors multiply to give a product
Multiples are products of a number
Perimeter is total length around a shape
